title: Sawmill House
description: Adds a new Sawmill house to the forest, with villager workers
body:
This Mod adds a small Sawmill House to the game, you will find Villager worker and some nice forest loot there.

The house is fully decorated inside.

you can find the structure in all type of forest biomes in the overworld

![Sawmill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e26aaa41f03ecff1fa0a5eb8f8a00a9ec6457bd.jpeg)

Compatible with the Sawmill mod — when installed, the structure will feature the Sawmill crafting station and Carpenter Villagers.
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sawmill


Feel free to put it in your modpack!
